metadata.description: Expanded algebra misconception knowledge graph with branching prerequisites
metadata.source: Extended from MaE Dataset (Otero et al., 2024) with standard algebra curriculum

concepts.name: Integer & Sign Operations
concepts.description: Arithmetic with negative numbers: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division with signed integers.

misconceptions.label: Sum of negatives becomes positive
misconceptions.description: Student adds two negative numbers and gets a positive result.

misconceptions.label: Negative times negative gives negative
misconceptions.description: Student multiplies two negatives and keeps the result negative.

misconceptions.label: Subtracting a negative treated as subtraction
misconceptions.description: Student treats x - (-y) as x - y.

misconceptions.label: Always subtract smaller from larger
misconceptions.description: Student ignores sign and subtracts smaller from larger.

concepts.name: Basic Fraction Operations
concepts.description: Adding, subtracting, multiplying, dividing fractions and finding common denominators.

misconceptions.label: Add denominators when adding fractions
misconceptions.description: Student adds both numerators and denominators.

misconceptions.label: Cross multiply when adding
misconceptions.description: Student cross-multiplies instead of finding common denominator.

misconceptions.label: Flip dividend instead of divisor
misconceptions.description: When dividing fractions, student flips the first fraction instead of the second.

concepts.name: Order of Operations
concepts.description: PEMDAS/BODMAS rules for evaluating expressions with mixed operations.

misconceptions.label: Left-to-right ignoring precedence
misconceptions.description: Student evaluates strictly left to right without considering precedence.

misconceptions.label: Exponents applied after addition
misconceptions.description: Student adds before applying exponent.

misconceptions.label: Parentheses ignored
misconceptions.description: Student ignores parentheses and follows wrong precedence.

concepts.name: Exponent Rules
concepts.description: Laws of exponents: product rule, power rule, zero exponent, negative exponents.

misconceptions.label: Multiply bases instead of adding exponents
misconceptions.description: For x^a * x^b, student multiplies bases instead of adding exponents.

misconceptions.label: x^0 = 0 instead of 1
misconceptions.description: Student thinks anything to the zero power is zero.

misconceptions.label: Negative exponent makes value negative
misconceptions.description: Student thinks x^(-n) = -x^n instead of 1/x^n.

concepts.name: Ratios & Proportions
concepts.description: Setting up and solving proportions, unit rates, and ratio comparisons.

misconceptions.label: Additive instead of multiplicative reasoning
misconceptions.description: Student adds a constant instead of multiplying by scale factor.

misconceptions.label: Set up proportion inverted
misconceptions.description: Student sets up cross multiplication with wrong pairing.

examples.problem: If 4 widgets cost $12, how much do 7 cost?
If 3 pencils cost $1.50, how much do 10 cost?

concepts.name: Distributive Property
concepts.description: Applying a(b+c) = ab + ac and factoring common factors.

misconceptions.label: Only distribute to first term
misconceptions.description: Student multiplies only the first term inside parentheses.

misconceptions.label: Square distributes over addition
misconceptions.description: Student treats (a+b)^2 as a^2 + b^2.

misconceptions.label: Sign error when distributing negative
misconceptions.description: Student forgets to change signs when distributing a negative.

misconceptions.label: Drop parentheses without distributing
misconceptions.description: Student removes parentheses but doesn't multiply.

concepts.name: Combining Like Terms
concepts.description: Identifying and combining terms with the same variable and exponent.

misconceptions.label: Combine unlike terms
misconceptions.description: Student adds coefficients of terms with different variables or exponents.

misconceptions.label: Multiply variables when combining
misconceptions.description: Student multiplies instead of adding like terms.

misconceptions.label: Add exponents when combining
misconceptions.description: Student adds exponents when combining like terms.

concepts.name: Equations with Fractions
concepts.description: Solving equations that contain fractions by clearing denominators.

misconceptions.label: Clear only one denominator
misconceptions.description: When clearing fractions, student multiplies only one side or one term.

misconceptions.label: Wrong LCD chosen
misconceptions.description: Student picks an incorrect least common denominator.

concepts.name: Variables & Expressions
concepts.description: Translating words into algebraic expressions and evaluating expressions.

misconceptions.label: Variable is a label not a number
misconceptions.description: Student treats the variable as a letter label rather than an unknown number.

misconceptions.label: Concatenate instead of multiply
misconceptions.description: Student writes 2x as 2 concatenated with x (like 23).

concepts.name: Solving Linear Equations
concepts.description: Isolating the variable in one-step and multi-step linear equations.

misconceptions.label: Apply same operation instead of inverse
misconceptions.description: Student adds when should subtract (or vice versa).

misconceptions.label: Multiply instead of divide
misconceptions.description: Student multiplies both sides when should divide.

misconceptions.label: Operate on wrong side of equation
misconceptions.description: Student applies operation to the wrong side.

misconceptions.label: Move term without changing sign
misconceptions.description: Student moves a term across the equals sign without flipping its sign.

concepts.name: Solving Inequalities
concepts.description: Solving and graphing one-variable linear inequalities, including sign flip on multiply/divide by negative.

misconceptions.label: Don't flip sign when dividing by negative
misconceptions.description: Student divides both sides by a negative but keeps inequality direction.

misconceptions.label: Always flip the inequality sign
misconceptions.description: Student flips the sign even when dividing by a positive.

concepts.name: Multi-Step Equations
concepts.description: Solving equations requiring distribution, combining like terms, and multiple inverse operations.

misconceptions.label: Perform steps in wrong order
misconceptions.description: Student divides before combining like terms or distributing.

misconceptions.label: Distribute but forget a term
misconceptions.description: Student distributes correctly but drops a term in the next step.

misconceptions.label: Error collecting variables from both sides
misconceptions.description: Student makes sign errors when moving variables across equals.

concepts.name: Absolute Value
concepts.description: Evaluating absolute value expressions and solving absolute value equations.

misconceptions.label: Absolute value just removes sign
misconceptions.description: Student thinks |x| always equals x, ignoring that it could be -x.

misconceptions.label: Distribute absolute value to each term
misconceptions.description: Student applies absolute value to each term separately.

concepts.name: Coordinate Plane & Plotting
concepts.description: Identifying and plotting ordered pairs, understanding quadrants.

misconceptions.label: Swap x and y coordinates
misconceptions.description: Student plots (y, x) instead of (x, y).

misconceptions.label: Wrong quadrant for negative coordinates
misconceptions.description: Student places point in wrong quadrant when coordinates are negative.

concepts.name: Slope of a Line
concepts.description: Calculating slope from two points, interpreting slope as rate of change.

misconceptions.label: Slope = run/rise instead of rise/run
misconceptions.description: Student computes delta_x/delta_y instead of delta_y/delta_x.

misconceptions.label: Inconsistent subtraction order
misconceptions.description: Student subtracts x1-x2 in numerator but x2-x1 in denominator.

concepts.name: Linear Functions (y = mx + b)
concepts.description: Slope-intercept form, graphing lines, finding equations from graphs.

misconceptions.label: Confuse slope and y-intercept
misconceptions.description: Student reads m as the intercept and b as the slope.

examples.problem: What is the slope of y = 3x + 5?
What is the y-intercept of y = -2x + 7?

misconceptions.label: Y-intercept is where y=0
misconceptions.description: Student finds x-intercept instead of y-intercept.

misconceptions.label: Parallel lines have same intercept
misconceptions.description: Student confuses same slope (parallel) with same intercept.

examples.problem: Which line is parallel to y = 2x + 3?

concepts.name: Systems of Linear Equations
concepts.description: Solving pairs of linear equations by substitution or elimination.

misconceptions.label: Add equations without aligning coefficients
misconceptions.description: Student adds equations directly without making coefficients match.

misconceptions.label: Substitute into same equation
misconceptions.description: After solving for one variable, student substitutes back into the same equation.

examples.wrong: 3 + y = 5 from eq1 (correct) but uses eq1 if derived from it

misconceptions.label: Find one variable and stop
misconceptions.description: Student finds x but forgets to find y.

concepts.name: Polynomial Operations
concepts.description: Adding, subtracting, and multiplying polynomials.

misconceptions.label: Add exponents when adding polynomials
misconceptions.description: Student adds exponents when adding like terms in polynomials.

misconceptions.label: Missing terms in FOIL
misconceptions.description: Student forgets inner or outer terms when multiplying binomials.

misconceptions.label: Sign error subtracting polynomials
misconceptions.description: Student forgets to distribute the negative when subtracting.

concepts.name: Factoring Polynomials
concepts.description: Factoring out GCF, factoring trinomials, difference of squares.

misconceptions.label: Find numbers that add not multiply to c
misconceptions.description: For x^2 + bx + c, student finds numbers that add to c instead of multiply to c and add to b.

misconceptions.label: Wrong signs in difference of squares
misconceptions.description: Student writes a^2 - b^2 = (a - b)(a - b) instead of (a+b)(a-b).

misconceptions.label: Factor out partial GCF
misconceptions.description: Student factors out part of the GCF but not all of it.

concepts.name: Solving Quadratic Equations
concepts.description: Solving ax^2 + bx + c = 0 by factoring, quadratic formula, and completing the square.

misconceptions.label: Wrong sign on b in quadratic formula
misconceptions.description: Student uses +b instead of -b in the formula.

misconceptions.label: Forget plus-or-minus in quadratic formula
misconceptions.description: Student only computes one root.

misconceptions.label: Set factors equal to each other instead of zero
misconceptions.description: After factoring, student sets factors equal to each other.
